---
title: "ClosedForm"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(catstats2)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
```

Load in the data

```{r}
data(snowdepths)

snowdepths$presence <- "Y"
snowdepths$presence[snowdepths$snow == 0] <- "N"

n.presence <- snowdepths |>
  subset(presence == "Y") |>
  tally()

n.presence <- n.presence$n

n.total <- length(snowdepths$presence)
```

Make beta pdfs

```{r}
bseq <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 500)

bdf <- data.frame(bseq = bseq)

#UNINFORMATIVE
bdf$up <- dbeta(bdf$bseq, shape1 = 1, shape2 = 1)
bdf$uninform <- dbeta(bdf$bseq, shape1 = n.presence, shape2 = n.total - n.presence)

#I think there'll be some snow this year
bdf$lp <- dbeta(bdf$bseq, shape1 = 30, shape2 = 15)
bdf$lsnow <- dbeta(bdf$bseq, shape1 = 29 + n.presence, shape2 = 14 + n.total - n.presence)

#I REALLY think there'll be some snow this year
bdf$slp <- dbeta(bdf$bseq, shape1 = 300, shape2 = 150)
bdf$slsnow <- dbeta(bdf$bseq, shape1 = 299 + n.presence, shape2 = 149 + n.total - n.presence)

#I think there'll be less snow this year
bdf$vlp <- dbeta(bdf$bseq, shape1 = 4, shape2 = 90)
bdf$vlsnow <- dbeta(bdf$bseq, shape1 = 3 + n.presence, shape2 = 89 + n.total - n.presence)

#I REALLY think there'll be almost no snow this year
bdf$sp <- dbeta(bdf$bseq, shape1 = 2, shape2 = 300)
bdf$ssnow <- dbeta(bdf$bseq, shape1 = 1 + n.presence, shape2 = 299 + n.total - n.presence)
```

First: plot priors

```{r}
bdf |>
  ggplot() +
  geom_line(aes(x = bseq, y = up, col = "1"), lwd = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(x = bseq, y = lp, col = "2"), lwd = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(x = bseq, y = slp, col = "3"), lwd = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(x = bseq, y = vlp, col = "4"), lwd = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(x = bseq, y = sp, col = "5"), lwd = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Prior Type",
                     values = c("1" = "red", "2" = "orange",
                                "3" = "green", "4" = "blue",
                                "5" = "purple"),
                     labels = c("1" = "Uninformative",
                                "2" = "Some Snow (Semi Informative)",
                                "3" = "Some Snow (Informative)",
                                "4" = "No Snow (Informative)",
                                "5" = "No Snow (Strongly Informative)")) +
  labs(x = "Possible Theta Values",
       y = "Density",
       title = "Used Prior Distributions")
```

PLOT!!!!!!

```{r}
bdf |>
  ggplot() +
  geom_line(aes(x = bseq, y = uninform, col = "1"), lwd = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(x = bseq, y = lsnow, col = "2"), lwd = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(x = bseq, y = slsnow, col = "3"), lwd = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(x = bseq, y = vlsnow, col = "4"), lwd = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(x = bseq, y = ssnow, col = "5"), lwd = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Prior Type",
                     values = c("1" = "red", "2" = "orange",
                                "3" = "green", "4" = "blue",
                                "5" = "purple"),
                     labels = c("1" = "Uninformative",
                                "2" = "Some Snow (Semi Informative)",
                                "3" = "Some Snow (Informative)",
                                "4" = "No Snow (Informative)",
                                "5" = "No Snow (Strongly Informative)")) +
  labs(x = "Possible Theta Values",
       y = "Density",
       title = "Posterior Distributions for Theta")
```
